pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 24 confirms URL construction; docker-compose.yml configures Jitsi web service on localhost:8080; valid Jitsi Meet URL format

setup_task.sh line 12 and export_result.sh line 64 confirm this file path is expected; Jitsi Meet documentation confirms noise suppression is a real feature accessible via Settings menu; web search confirmed RNNoise-based implementation

setup_task.sh line 11 and export_result.sh line 65 confirm this file path; Jitsi Meet documentation confirms self-view hide is a real feature ('Hide Self View' option and disableSelfView configuration exist)
setup_task.sh line 42 creates this file as baseline screenshot; export_result.sh analyzes it for state changes; verifier.py line 49 uses it for anti-gaming checks

privileged_info_summary: Task requires configuring Jitsi Meet A/V settings on version stable-9753 running at http://localhost:8080. Noise suppression is a verified feature in Jitsi Meet using RNNoise technology, accessible through Settings or as a clickable button in the audio settings. Self-view hiding is a verified Jitsi Meet feature available through 'Hide Self View' option in settings or the disableSelfView configuration option. Meeting URL format http://localhost:8080/VirtualHIITClass follows standard Jitsi Meet URL structure. Evidence files are generated during task execution as PNG screenshots stored in /tmp/. The verifier uses VLM analysis of these screenshots to confirm both features are enabled and applies anti-gaming timestamps to validate genuine task completion.
